description: Black-box ingest, indexing-convergence, and federated-search gate for the disposable multi-node Kubernetes topology.
cluster_shape: kind: control-plane=1,infra=1,workload=3; app: query=2,indexing=2,admin=2; data: postgres=1,kafka=1,redis=1,typesense=2
image_policy: Application images are built from the measured Git worktree and resolved to repository digests at runtime; every dependency and node image is digest pinned.
